automated.name: deps
automated.details: OAuth2 auth server removed, sacco-member added

warnings.issue: JSON string interpolation without escaping in authenticationEntryPoint and accessDeniedHandler. Exception messages passed directly to String.format in JSON template.
Refresh endpoint leaks internal error message via e.getMessage(). Login endpoint uses static messages. Should be consistent.

suggestions.suggestion: Reuse SecureRandom instance as a class field instead of creating new on every call
No rate limiting on login/refresh. Consider brute-force protection.
deleteByExpiresAtBefore exists but is never called. Add @Scheduled cleanup job.
Token expiry values (3600s access, 7d refresh) are hardcoded. Make configurable via @Value.
